title: musa peekelii subsp. angustigemma
intro: Musa peekelii subsp. angustigemma, also known as the 'Tall Canna-like Banana', is a plant species belonging to the genus Musa and family Musaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for fever and digestive problems. Musa peekelii subsp. angustigemma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used in traditional folk medicine.
